name: com.pulsemcp/agent-orchestrator
description: MCP server for PulseMCP's Agent Orchestrator — manage agent sessions, notifications, and triggers.

environmentVariables.name: AGENT_ORCHESTRATOR_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL for the Agent Orchestrator API.

environmentVariables.name: AGENT_ORCHESTRATOR_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for authenticating with Agent Orchestrator.

environmentVariables.name: TOOL_GROUPS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated list of enabled tool groups (sessions, sessions_readonly, notifications, notifications_readonly, triggers, triggers_readonly, health, health_readonly, self_session).

environmentVariables.name: ALLOWED_AGENT_ROOTS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated list of allowed agent root names; constrains sessions to specific agent roots.

environmentVariables.name: SKIP_HEALTH_CHECKS
environmentVariables.description: Skip API connectivity check at startup.
